local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Read the two local scheduled crawler issue captures for #2246 and #1957 and checked the June joined NCCL API/comment corpus, the July 1/3 NCCL scheduled supplement manifest, existing NCCL curated pages, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, ingest.md, and prior parent manifests. The June joined API/comment corpus curated scope ends at issues created through 2026-06-22 and closed through 2026-06-23; a zgrep for #2246/#1957 identities in the joined corpus returned no matches. The July 1/3 supplement contains only #2226 and #2024.
local_checks.wiki_search: Before task-1, curated NCCL GitHub Closed Issues represented the joined API/comment corpus, the July 1/3 page-level supplement for #2226 and #2024, and the closed-issue workflow caveat. NCCL Release Notes already represented GIN terminology from NCCL 2.29.7, 2.30.3, 2.30.4, and 2.30.7. NCCL Arxiv Papers and parent-25 represented abstract discovery only. Curated pages, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, and ingest.md did not contain #2246, #1957, CuTeDSL, ncclDevComm, cudaErrorIllegalAddress, gin_alltoall_pure, 1500 MTU, 4K MTU, or doca modify qp as promoted parent evidence.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: Read ai_infra wiki/index.md and nearby NCCL pages. The existing index routes NCCL operational issue evidence to NCCL GitHub Closed Issues and NCCL project pages, so task-1 updates those pages and the coverage map instead of creating a new standalone page.

gap_reason: Task-1 is the active run-local semantic parent-28 boundary for the 26b4d5f774 remediation. It promotes only the bounded July 11/14 NCCL page-level issue supplement for #2246 and #1957 after confirming those issues are not already fully represented in curated pages, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, prior parent manifests, or the July 1/3 #2226/#2024 supplement.
boundaries: The two issue pages are scheduled crawler page-level supplement evidence only, not a full API/comment corpus refresh.
Issue #2246 is represented only as a CuTeDSL NCCL device-API question/report about `ncclDevComm` device dereference failure on H20.

Issue #1957 is represented only as a GIN GDAKI mode report about `gin_alltoall_pure`, 1500 MTU NIC behavior, and reporter-observed hard-coded 4K MTU behavior in `doca modify qp` / `doca modify QP` context.

No external fetch, comment join, release-note claim, confirmed fix, production postmortem, benchmark baseline, accelerator catalog change, crawler code change, frontend change, dashboard change, harness change, or package change is part of this evidence artifact.
